title: convallaria majalis f. prolificans
intro: Convallaria majalis f. prolificans, commonly known as Lily of the valley, is a flowering plant species in the Asparagaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its cardiac glycosides, which have been shown to have a positive effect on the heart by increasing the force of heart contractions and reducing heart rate. The health benefits of Convallaria majalis f. prolificans include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of hyperthyroidism. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into tinctures, teas, or infusions, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits, but it is essential to note that this plant should only be used under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential toxicity.
